Hero.title: Pakistan's B2B
Hero.subtitle: Order certified seeds, fertilizers, pesticides & farm equipment in bulk. Trusted by distributors and dealers across Pakistan.

Home.description: Pakistan's platform for agri-input distributors and dealers. Source certified seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and farm equipment with transparent wholesale pricing.
Home.ogDescription: Order agri inputs in bulk — seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, farm equipment. B2B platform for Pakistan's agri distributors and dealers.

highQuality.title: Certified Products
highQuality.description: Seeds and inputs from registered, verified suppliers only

bestPrices.title: Wholesale Pricing
bestPrices.description: Dealer and distributor pricing tiers built in from day one

fastDelivery.title: Nationwide Delivery
fastDelivery.description: Covering all major agri zones across Pakistan

Product.addedToCartDescription: {name} has been added to your cart
Product.errorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart

shipping.question: What are your delivery options?
shipping.answer: We deliver to all major cities and agri zones across Pakistan. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. For bulk orders, contact us for dedicated freight arrangements.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for damaged or incorrect items. Products must be in original, sealed packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive an SMS and email with a tracking number. You can also view your order status anytime by logging into your dealer account.

international.question: Do you have minimum order quantities?
international.answer: Yes, minimum order quantities (MOQ) apply per product. MOQ requirements are shown on each product page. This ensures competitive pricing for bulk buyers.
